name: Polar Power, Inc.
business: Polar Power designs, manufactures, and sells DC power generators, renewable energy and cooling systems primarily for the telecommunications market, and to a lesser extent for military, electric vehicle charging, marine, and industrial markets. Its DC power systems range from 5 kW to 50 kW and are available in diesel, natural gas, LPG/propane, and renewable fuel formats. The company also offers hybrid and solar hybrid systems integrating battery storage and photovoltaic modules.

exposures.sentence: Our sales are primarily within the telecommunications market and, to a lesser extent, in military, electric vehicle charging, marine and industrial markets.
Since 1979, we have been developing and marketing products to the U.S. military and large defense contractors
We are in the process of upgrading our CHAdeMO chargers to CCS natural gas-powered electric vehicle charger and combined heat and power generators.
Hybrid power systems . These systems integrate lithium-ion batteries (or other advanced battery chemistries) storage and our standard DC power systems
DC solar hybrid power systems . These stationary systems incorporate photovoltaic and other sources of renewable energy into our DC hybrid power systems.
Mobile power systems. These are very light weight and compact power systems used for EV charging, robotics, communications, security.
Our Mini-Grid system uses natural gas or LPG as primary fuel source
In 2024, we began to expand our sales and service network for our natural gas generators,
we use Neodymium permanent magnets in our alternators, for which there are a limited number of global suppliers
Our operations require raw materials, such as aluminum, copper and permanent magnets.

catalysts.event: Entry into ATM sales agreement with ThinkEquity LLC
catalysts.sentence: On October 6, 2025, the Company entered into an ATM sales agreement (the Sales Agreement ) with ThinkEquity LLC (the Sales Agent ), pursuant to which the Company may offer and sell, from time to time (the Offering ) through the Sales Agent, shares (the Shares ) of the Company s common stock

catalysts.event: Stockholder approval of 2026 Equity Incentive Plan
catalysts.sentence: On December 15, 2025, the stockholders of the Company approved the Polar Power, Inc. 2026 Equity Incentive Plan at the 2025 annual meeting of stockholders of the Company, among other matters.

On December 23 2025, the Company entered into a business loan and security agreement (the WWCM Loan Agreement ) with World Wide Capital Management ( WWCM ), pursuant to which the Company borrowed net proceeds of $399

catalysts.event: Pinnacle Forbearance Agreement termination date for full repayment
catalysts.sentence: pays in full all obligations to Pinnacle by the Termination Date.

tamClaims.claim: global electric vehicle market size accounted for USD 255.54 billion in 2023 and is expected to reach USD 2,108.80 billion by 2033, growing at a CAGR of 23.4% during 2024-2033
tamClaims.sentence: According to Precedence Research, a market research company, the global electric vehicle market size accounted for USD 255.54 billion in 2023 and is expected to reach USD 2,108.80 billion by 2033, growing at a compound annual growth rate (CAGR) of 23.4% during the forecast period 2024 to 2033.

tamClaims.claim: global electric vehicle charging station market size reached USD 34.59 billion in 2023 and has a forecasted CAGR of 29.1% for 2023-2032
tamClaims.sentence: During 2023, the global electric vehicle charging station market size reached USD 34.59 billion and has a forecasted CAGR of 29.1% for the period of 2023 to 2032.
